question: How can an agent reuse citation evidence?

evidence.title: Citation Memory
evidence.text: SQLite memory stores evidence records with source chunks and quotes for later audit.
evidence.quote: SQLite memory stores evidence records with source chunks and quotes.

evidence.title: Vector Recall
evidence.text: A numpy vector index retrieves similar evidence ids for semantic memory recall.
evidence.quote: A numpy vector index retrieves similar evidence ids.

evidence.title: Cooking Note
evidence.text: A recipe uses salt, soup, and kitchen tools.

learning_note: SQLite keeps the inspectable source records, while the numpy vector index retrieves candidate evidence ids for recall.

question: Why combine SQLite and vector memory?

evidence.title: SQLite Source of Truth
evidence.text: SQLite is useful as source-of-truth storage for runs, tasks, evidence, claims, and reports.
evidence.quote: SQLite is useful as source-of-truth storage.

evidence.title: Semantic Recall
evidence.text: Vector retrieval helps recall related evidence when a new query uses different wording.
evidence.quote: Vector retrieval helps recall related evidence.

learning_note: Hybrid memory separates auditable storage from similarity search: vector search returns ids, SQLite returns full records.
